name: Wellness Cugó Gran
description: On a 100-hectare estate near Sant Climent, the Cugó Gran wellbeing centre brings together a team of therapists, gardens and relaxation areas for a carefully tended calm. The Cugó Gran retreat offers four days of reconnection.

highlights: A wellbeing centre with therapists and bespoke treatments
Gardens and relaxation areas on a 100-hectare estate
Cugó Gran Retreat: a four-day wellbeing experience
